chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D - 1380 of 2022 Date order with Signature of Hon’ble Judge For non-prosecution 07.09.2023 Since filing of this petition on 01.11.2022, petitioner and his Counsel have never pursued it. Today, no one is present and no intimation is received. Accordingly, the petition is dismissed for non-prosecution. Judge Judge ARBROHI
